name: Roshan Fathima
text: Got my haircut and hair Botox done at Meenu Makeup Studio and omg the results are so good!!! My hair feels super soft, frizz-free. Meenu sis really took her time to understand what I wanted and delivered exactly that. Totally worth it!!!

name: Bakya Maruthappan
text: We have booked Meenu Makeover for my sister in law. Both Muhurtham and engagement looks are very beautiful and unique. Thanks you sister for the wonderful work.

name: Kiruthika Kanagaraj
text: I recently had my makeup done by Meenu Makeover for a special occasion, and the results were fantastic! The makeup was absolutely superb! I was so happy with how the pictures turned out, and I've been sharing them with everyone. The feedback has been unanimous — all my friends and family said I looked awesome! Your skill and attention to detail truly made my day extra special. Highly recommended!

name: Krish Kanna
text: I booked her for my sister's wedding. Such an excellent makeup done by her. Really thank you so much mam for your great work and dedication. Thank you again.

name: Anu Priya
text: I came for layer cut and hair colouring. Superb service, very friendly staff, cozy ambience. I'm very satisfied with the service!

name: Anuja
text: I loved the makeup akka, really really happy! Thanks for making my big day even more special.

name: Sharmi
text: Hi mam, make up super erundhuchu, yellarum sonnanga — very natural and also a different look. Thanks for making my day more special.

name: Happy Bride
text: Thank you so much, mam! You made me feel so pretty and confident. You really did an amazing job, and I truly loved my entire look. Will call soon to discuss for our reception date booking!

name: Yuvarani
text: Ur work was awesome mam. Many of them appreciated the makeup. Thank you so much for making my day more special!

name: Naga Rani
text: I had the best service here — I'm so happy that I found this location! They make me feel like home, they are so calm and kind. They even provided me tea. So happy that I found the best service!

name: Arulpandi A
text: Best service and AFFORDABLE price. Very best parlour... I am fully satisfied with the makeup work!!

name: Suganya Narayanan
text: Very happy to share my experience here — thanks a lot to Meenu Makeover! Got my permanent hair straightening done here. I am so happy with the service here... too good!

name: SN Valli
text: Very very excellent — super engagement and marriage makeup! Even without looking in the mirror the makeup felt so good. Absolutely loved it!

name: Vicky Viki
text: So happy with my facial experience here! Skin looked brighter and more refreshed instantly. Premium products, professional staff, and they walked me through every step.

name: Rithika
text: I booked them through a Facebook post and got the trial makeup done — I was so satisfied with their work! I loved their hospitality too. They give suggestions rather than just following client preferences blindly, and I'm so glad I followed their advice. The makeup went so well, and it lasted more than 8 hours! That made me even happier. Thank you Meenu Makeover — for your good soul you will grow more.

name: Sharmila
text: I visited Meenu Makeover and did a keratin treatment — very good and very professional service. Thank you Meenu Makeover!
